title: Restoration of privileged checkpointed container fails due to ProcessLabel being undefined for privileged container
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

When performing checkpoint/restore on privileged containers, the checkpoint does not indicate any issues/problems but the restore fails indicating:

```
# podman container restore -i ./container-test-checkpoint.tar.gz 
Error: error creating container storage: ProcessLabel and Mountlabel must either not be specified or both specified
# 
```

On investigation, it was found that `ProcessLabel=""` for a privileged containers which leads to the error condition.

More discussion of the issue is here: https://github.com/containers/podman/discussions/10581?sort=new

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. Create privileged container
2. Perform `podman inspect <container-id> | grep -b2 ProcessLabel` - it should show that `ProcessLabel` is set to `""`
3. Perform a checkpoint operation
4. Perform a restore operation

**Describe the results you received:**

Error as indicated above.

**Describe the results you expected:**

Container should be restored or checkpointing operation should fail indicating that it cannot extract neessary information from runtime environment to create restorable checkpoint.

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
[root@ip-10-0-2-204 fedora]# podman --version
podman version 3.1.2
[root@ip-10-0-2-204 fedora]# criu --version
Version: 3.15
[root@ip-10-0-2-204 fedora]# crun --version
crun version 0.19.1
commit: 1535fedf0b83fb898d449f9680000f729ba719f5
spec: 1.0.0
+SYSTEMD +SELINUX +APPARMOR +CAP +SECCOMP +EBPF +CRIU +YAJL
[root@ip-10-0-2-204 fedora]# cat /etc/os-release
NAME=Fedora
VERSION="33 (Cloud Edition)"
ID=fedora
VERSION_ID=33
<snip>
```

**Output of `podman info --debug`:**


**Package info (e.g. output of `rpm -q podman` or `apt list podman`):**

```
[root@ip-10-0-2-102 ~]# rpm -q podman
podman-3.1.2-2.fc33.x86_64
```

**Have you tested with the latest version of Podman and have you checked the Podman Troubleshooting Guide? (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/troubleshooting.md)**

No

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**

Running Fedora VM on AWS.
